privacy.intro: This policy explains how {{company}} (‘we’) processes personal data in the context of our website and services, in line with the GDPR.

sections.body: {{company}}, based at Poststraat 1, 6135 KR Sittard. Contact: support@hotsites.nl.
Including: name, company name, email, content of messages you send via the contact form, and technical data such as IP address and browser type (where processed by hosting/logs).

We process data to handle contact requests (contract or legitimate interest), to operate and secure our website (legitimate interest), and to comply with legal obligations. Where required, we ask consent first (e.g. non-essential cookies or newsletters).

We keep contact details as long as needed to handle your request and thereafter for statutory retention where applicable. Server logs follow our hosting provider’s policy and what is reasonably needed for security.

We share data with IT and hosting providers who help run the site (processors), with agreements in place where required. Data generally stays in the EEA. If transfer outside the EEA occurs, we use appropriate safeguards (e.g. SCCs).
You have rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability and objection, where the law allows. You may withdraw consent where it is the basis.
If you have a complaint about processing, contact us first. You may also lodge a complaint with the Dutch DPA: https://autoriteitpersoonsgegevens.nl
These terms apply to all offers and agreements between {{company}} and the client unless agreed otherwise in writing.
An agreement is formed after written (including email) acceptance of the quote or order confirmation.
Prices exclude VAT unless stated otherwise. Invoicing follows the quote. For late payment we may suspend work and charge statutory interest and costs where permitted.

Our liability is limited to direct damage and up to the fees paid in the relevant year for the service, except in case of intent or gross negligence. We are not liable for indirect or consequential damage.
Neither party must perform during force majeure, provided the other party is informed promptly.
Dutch law applies. Disputes are submitted to the competent court in Limburg, unless mandatory law dictates otherwise.

cookies.intro: This page describes which cookies (and similar technologies) may be used and how you manage preferences.

sections.body: Required for core functionality and security. Without them the site cannot work properly.
For example language preference stored in the browser (localStorage) so you see the site in your chosen language.
If we use analytics, we load it only after explicit consent via the banner. Without consent, no non-essential tracking scripts load.
If we embed third-party content or tools, those parties may set their own cookies. We list them here and in the banner where relevant.

Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies. Firefox: Settings → Privacy & Security. Safari: Preferences → Privacy. Edge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions. Use your browser’s help for ‘clear cookies’.
You can withdraw consent for non-essential cookies by showing the banner again via ‘Cookie settings’ in the footer, or by deleting cookies for our site in your browser.

imprint.representative: Representation: the partners of the partnership

structuredData.organizationDescription: Marketing and web development from Limburg, React websites, hosted in Europe.

start.title: Who is this site for?
start.lead: Choose whether you deliver the solution to clients, or you need a website for your own business.

resellers.title: Technology reseller
resellers.description: Business-like but approachable, for partners who deliver Hotsites to SME clients.

sme.title: For business owners
sme.description: A website that does what it should, EU hosting, fuss-free maintenance.

resellers.pageTitle: Static sites you can deliver to clients
resellers.highlight1: Pre-rendered React, fast loads and predictable performance.
resellers.highlight2: EU hosting, domain management, and security bundled in one annual contract.
resellers.highlight3: No vendor lock-in: mainstream stack, always transferable to another provider.
resellers.partnerCtaTitle: Become a partner or talk it through?
resellers.partnerCtaBody: Get in touch if you want to deliver Hotsites to your own clients, or if you have technical or commercial questions.
resellers.intro: A standardised website solution based on static React technology. Suited for delivery to SME clients with a well-scoped website need, no CMS runtime dependencies, no WordPress, and no vendor lock-in for the end client.
resellers.whatBody: Hotsites is a build system for static websites that you deploy as a reseller for clients who need a dependable, high-performing online presence. The output is always a pre-rendered React site: no runtime database, no plugin stack, and no CMS that must be updated separately.
resellers.whatBodySecond: The codebase uses mainstream, well-documented technology. Transferability is a first-class requirement, the site can always be taken over by another party, which makes the product attractive for clients who want to avoid long-term dependency.

specs.detail: No runtime CMS or database dependencies

resellers.deliverTitle: What does the end client get?
resellers.deliverLead: The end client receives a pre-rendered website that is fully loaded before the first visit, there is no application server re-processing on every click. That typically means measurably better load performance than standard WordPress setups.
deliverables: No themes or plugins that update independently and conflict
Built as one whole, one version, one deployment, no loose parts
No vendor lock-in: mainstream technology, transferable to any other provider
EU hosting with domain management and security included in annual maintenance
resellers.maintenanceBody: After go-live the site is covered by an annual maintenance contract. This includes hosting, domain management, security updates, and monthly text changes. Each year there is a fixed review to align the site with how the end client’s business has evolved.
resellers.maintenanceFootnote: There are no separate update chains or plugin compatibility puzzles, the system is designed to stay stable without constant hands-on CMS administration.

sme.pageTitle: A business website, without the technical hassle
sme.highlight1: Fast and stable: fixed pages ready before visitors click, no slow background stack on every request.
sme.highlight2: EU hosting with privacy in mind (GDPR), your data stays in Europe.
sme.highlight3: One annual contract with a fixed review of your website and the vision behind it: hosting, domain, and security included, plus yearly updates so the site stays aligned with your business vision.
sme.ctaTitle: Questions or want to talk it through?
sme.ctaBody: Get in touch if you want to see whether Hotsites fits your company, or to discuss anything else.
sme.intro: A website that does what it should. Built on solid technology, hosted in Europe, and maintained without fuss, so you can focus on running your business.
sme.whatBody: Hotsites is a website solution for companies that want a dependable, fast site without the cost and complexity of a fully bespoke application. The site is fixed pages that are ready before a visitor clicks anything, there is no background stack spinning up again on every click.
sme.whatBodySecond: The result is a stable, fast website that is straightforward to maintain and avoids unnecessary technical risk.
sme.wordPressCompareTitle: How is it different from WordPress?
sme.wordPressCompareBody: WordPress combines a theme, plugins, and external integrations that each update on their own, and often conflict. Hotsites is built as one whole. There are no loose parts that can destabilise the system, and you do not need someone applying weekly patch rounds.
wordPressBullets: No plugins getting in each other’s way
No theme updates that break your layout
No separate CMS to secure and maintain
One version, one deployment, clear and stable
sme.euDataBody: Your website is hosted only on European servers. That aligns with European privacy law (GDPR) and means your data and your visitors’ data are not processed or stored outside the EU.
sme.noLockInBody: Hotsites uses mainstream, well-documented technology. If you ever want to work with another provider, you can, the website and its code are always transferable. You are not locked to a single supplier.
sme.maintenanceBody: After go-live your site is covered by an annual maintenance contract. That includes hosting, domain management, security, and small text updates. Once a year we schedule a fixed moment to review what changed in your business and which updates fit, so your site stays current without you chasing it.
